subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and O My leaf! The Trusted One hath presented himself before the Wronged One, and at his mention of thee We make mention of thee in this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و یا ورقتی قد حضر الامین عند المظلوم و ذکرک ذکرناک بهذا الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation
